name: Patient Case
history: Multiple past jobs involved micromanagement. Reports self-blame in work contexts.
intermediate_belief: If I can't meet expectations, I am not good enough.
intermediate_belief_depression: I will never be able to succeed in my job.
coping_strategies: Considering resigning to escape the situation.
situation: Experiencing micromanagement at the workplace and considering resigning.
auto_thought: I can't handle this pressure; I need to leave.
behavior: Contemplating resignation as a way to cope with the stress.
